content:
LIC premium online bharna ab bilkul aasaan hai. Main apne Gorakhpur ke 500+ clients ki premium bharwa chuka hun phone par hi. Aaj main aapko 5 tarike bataata hun jo 2026 mein best kaam karte hain.

Tarika 1: LIC Customer Portal (licindia.in). Yeh sabse reliable method hai. licindia.in kholen, 'Pay Premium Online' par click karen. New user hain to register karen: policy number, date of birth, email aur mobile number chahiye. Login karne ke baad aapki sab policies ek jagah dikhti hain. Premium amount check karen, next due date dekhein, aur payment karne ke liye Debit Card, Credit Card ya Net Banking choose karen. Receipt turant aapke email par aati hai. Yeh receipt important hai: is se hi IT returns aur 80C claim hota hai, isliye save karke rakhein.

Tarika 2: MyLIC App. Google Play ya App Store se 'MyLIC' install karen. Registration LIC policy number, DOB aur registered mobile se hoti hai. Login ke baad 'Pay Premium' tab mein jayen, policy select karen, amount confirm karen, aur UPI, Net Banking ya Card se payment karen. App receipt automatically save karta hai.

Tarika 3: PayTM ya PhonePe. Dono apps mein 'Insurance' section mein 'LIC' select karen. Policy number dalein, premium amount aata hai, confirm karen aur UPI se bhugtan karen. Seedha LIC account mein jaata hai. Yeh method unke liye best hai jinhein LIC website ka use nahin aata lekin UPI comfortable hai.

Tarika 4: Internet Banking ke through NEFT. Agar aapka net banking account hai, to payee add karen: LIC ka bank NEFT code aur account number LIC website par milta hai ya branch se milta hai. Amount daalen aur transfer karen. Yeh thoda slow hai (1-2 din) lekin bilkul safe hai.

Tarika 5: Auto-debit/Standing Instruction. Yeh sabse best setting hai jo main recommend karta hun. LIC branch mein ya MyLIC app mein ECS/auto-debit mandate set karein apne bank account se. Har due date par automatically debit ho jaata hai. Policy kabhi lapse nahin hogi. Ek baar set karo, phir bhool jao.

Sabse common galatiya: wrong policy number dalna (ek digit galat hogi to payment pending rahega), premium amount wrong dalna (always confirm the exact amount from LIC portal first), aur due date ke baad payment karna bina grace period check kiye.

Premium bharne mein koi dikkat ho to WhatsApp karen 9415313434 par. Main 10 minute mein solve karta hun.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi: LIC प्रीमियम घर बैठे 5 तरीकों से भर सकते हैं: LIC पोर्टल, MyLIC ऐप, PayTM, PhonePe और बैंक ऑटो-डेबिट। Auto-debit सबसे अच्छी setting है: एक बार set करो, पॉलिसी कभी lapse नहीं होगी। प्रीमियम भरने में कोई दिक्कत हो तो WhatsApp करें 9415313434 पर।
